testimonials.name: Priya S.
testimonials.text: Found my perfect stylist. The booking was seamless and the salon was exactly as described.

testimonials.name: Ananya R.
testimonials.text: I love how easy it is to compare prices and read real reviews. No more guessing about quality.

testimonials.name: Meera P.
testimonials.text: Booked bridal makeup stress-free. The artist was incredible and everything was transparent.

suggestions: Hair color + spa in Andheri this weekend
